# Harshit Bhatia

Harshit Bhatia is the Chief Technology Officer at Assert AI, based in Delhi, India. His work focuses on Enterprise Agentic AI Systems, AI Platform Engineering, Computer Vision, Edge AI, AI Security, LLM applications, and CTO leadership.

## Entity Identity

- Primary name: Harshit Bhatia
- Role: Chief Technology Officer
- Company: Assert AI
- Location: Delhi, India
- Education: Indian School of Business; Maharaja Surajmal Institute Of Technology
- Canonical website: https://harshitbhatia.in/
- Canonical profile page: https://harshitbhatia.in/about
- Search aliases: Harshit Bhatia CTO, Harshit Bhatia Delhi, Harshit Bhatia Assert AI, harshitbhatiacto, bhatiaharshit07

## Education

- Indian School of Business: Emerging Leaders Programme, Organizational Leadership (Jun 2024 - Jan 2025)
- Maharaja Surajmal Institute Of Technology: Bachelor of Technology - BTech (Apr 2017 - May 2021)

## Featured Topics

- Enterprise Agentic AI Systems
- Multi-agent system architecture
- Enterprise RAG and AI gateway design
- Production LLM applications
- Computer vision and edge AI platforms
- AI security, governance, and observability
- Product leadership and CTO operating systems
- Organizational leadership and digital economy
